user.title: Companion Media Player
user.description: This integration supports Android devices only. The Media Session sensor must be enabled. Volume control is available only when the volume_level_music sensor is enabled. Actions from Home Assistant are sent almost in real time, while updates from the device depend on Companion App sensor reporting. See: https://companion.home-assistant.io/docs/core/sensors

abort.already_configured: Companion Media Player is already configured.

init.title: Companion Media Player Options
init.description: Configure the default behavior for all media players.
